expectations.text: Identifies that joins(:line_items) is 1:N and row-explodes the listing, so limit(20) returns 20 joined rows rather than 20 distinct orders
expectations.evidence: 'the list itself returns duplicates'; limit(20) selects from joined result, fewer than 20 distinct orders

expectations.text: Flags that scope.count reuses the joined/ordered listing scope, making the count both wrong (counts join rows) and expensive
expectations.evidence: Issue 1: COUNT(*) over join counts line items not orders; Issue 2 reuse + ORDER BY

expectations.text: Recommends counting distinct orders on a lean scope without the 1:N join (and without the ORDER BY)
Flags offset-based pagination degrading on deep pages and/or recommends keyset pagination
expectations.evidence: 'Pagination at scale': keyset/cursor instead of OFFSET which scans and discards skipped rows

expectations.text: States a tradeoff for at least one recommendation
expectations.evidence: 'If an exact total isn't essential, cache it / approximate / reltuples' — acknowledges cost of exact count
